home_title_1: CRM: choose the essential tool for all your agents
home_desc_1: With Vzite, centralize all your operations to efficiently manage your files and insurance products.
home_title_2: Choose an interface adapted to your real estate agency
home_desc_2: Manage your prospects effectively and track the progress of each rental file by easily collaborating with your team members. Equipped with an API and connectors, the CRM tool integrates perfectly into your work environment to improve your real estate agency activity and enrich your data.
home_desc_3: Innovative tools for benefits that meet your challenges, those of your landlords and your tenants.
home_desc_4: With the CRM tool, aggregate all the requests from your advertisements and your agency website. A contact form is automatically generated with the information collected so as not to lose any data. Thanks to statistical tables, analyze the distribution and origin of your contacts, and prioritize your distribution platforms.
home_desc_5: Streamline your customers' experience with an instant response. As soon as a candidate comes into contact with you, they are immediately supported by email and text message. You benefit from online customer discovery 24/7 and have maximum information for your follow-up in the agency.
home_desc_6: Configure a pre-qualification profile for one or more properties with the CRM tool and detect eligible candidates at a glance. When a prospective tenant responds to one of your ads, they are asked to answer a few questions about their situation to automatically calculate their eligibility.
time_saved_per_employee: Time saved per employee per week
home_title_7: Messaging synchronized with the CRM module
home_desc_7: No need to create a new email address, Vzite connects to your existing email. You can view and respond to your emails both in your usual email client and in Vzite.
home_desc_8: Centralize exchanges with your customers! Connected to your existing messaging, the integrated messaging allows you to exchange, notify and follow up on all your agency contacts. A property is no longer available? Thanks to response templates, you gain efficiency and can inform all candidates in one click.
home_desc_9: Consult messages from your candidate tenants directly in the Vzite CRM tool. You can respond from the software and create response templates to increase efficiency and keep a history with your customers.
use_the_best_technology_for_your_agency: Use the best technology for your agency

home_desc_11: Collect and manage your rental files securely

home_desc_13: Pre-qualify your tenant candidates automatically (GLI, Pinel Law, etc.)
